task: Advanced high-value task: Compiler Crash Signature Final Gate Recommendation. Scenario: a review committee needs a row-level exception analysis with no inferred or fabricated inputs for compiler crash signature. Embedded packet: Records: R1 frame_match_count=85 affected_OS_count=129 crash_count=4; R2 frame_match_count=94 affected_OS_count=125 crash_count=7; R3 frame_match_count=80 affected_OS_count=140 crash_count=3. Remediation options: O1 changes frame_match_count by -12% cost=98000; O2 changes affected_OS_count by -18% cost=110400; O3 changes crash_count by -25% cost=67600; max_budget=136800. Rules and constraints: same top frames cluster; affected_OS>=3 is cross-platform priority; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: create a validation checklist and fill it using the supplied records, citing the exact values behind each pass or failure. Deliver crash_cluster_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
